purpose: Tool-neutral image prompts for project-level reusable core prop and costume boards.

shared_rules.format: single PNG production art reference, vertical 9:16 or vertically readable board, no visible labels or captions inside the image
shared_rules.style: low-magic eastern epic, tactile realistic materials, low-saturation cinematic light, production reference board, readable in mobile vertical close-ups
shared_rules.locked_badge_rule: Do not redesign existing faction emblems. Existing emblems may be used only as root references for partial marks, wax stamps, pressure traces, hidden motifs, or worn fragments.
must_have: continuity with the current project style board, regional color system, base material boards, and current faction emblems
shared_rules.negative_prompt: readable text, captions, labels, Chinese characters, Latin letters, watermark, UI mockup, modern logo sheet, product catalog, cyberpunk, sci-fi interface, high fantasy magic circle, clean new badge redesign, over-saturated game art

shared_reference_inputs.role: project tactile material and palette reference
locked Zhaoming root emblem; use only as partial old sun-moon reference
locked Suming/Qingming root emblem; use only as institutional stamp or wax-seal reference
locked Northern Wanshou root emblem; use only as bone-wood craft reference

input_images.role: locked old empire emblem reference, partial worn mark only

prompts.image_prompt: Create one vertical PNG production reference image for the half Sun-Moon relay token. Show a palm-sized broken half-token on old cloth and stone dust, with a jagged fracture edge, a worn smooth rim, aged dull gold, moon-white ceramic or jade inlay, tiny gold-red broken route glints in shallow grooves, and soot on one edge from the Canyang Ao fire. The Zhaoming emblem reference may inform only a partial, almost-erased sun-moon pressure mark; do not show a complete clean emblem. The prop must look limited and practical, not a sacred universal key. Close-up tactile object reference, low-magic eastern epic, no visible text, no labels, no UI.
prompts.negative_prompt: complete round medallion, full clean Zhaoming badge, holy glow, universal magic key, readable inscription, Chinese characters, letters, watermark, modern coin, jewelry catalog

prompts.image_prompt: Create one vertical PNG hidden personal prop board for Yan Nanzhi's carried objects: a thin moon-white jade shard, a Sun-Moon blood writ fragment with dry blood-red broken lines, a more ancient moon oath remnant page, oil paper wrapping, a tiny inner-pocket lacquer box, blue-violet cloth lining, and a red hair cord tie. Make everything small enough to hide inside a travel robe. Royal identity should feel concealed, not displayed. Use mist purple, cold grey, moon-white, dry blood red, and restrained worn gold. All document marks must be abstract and unreadable. No visible text, no labels, no full lineage explanation.
prompts.negative_prompt: readable text, complete family tree, clean royal crest, full Sun-Moon emblem, treasure chest display, princess jewelry catalog, bright sacred gold, watermark, UI

input_images.role: locked Qingming emblem, small institutional stamp reference only

prompts.image_prompt: Create one vertical PNG production reference image for the Qingming white register book. It is a tall narrow institutional book on a bone-white desk: bone-white cover, insect-wax sealed spine, pearl-grey cracked surface, cold-gold pin heads, layered page edges, a small black-sun wax-stamp fragment based on the locked Qingming emblem, and an extremely small dry blood red trace on the page edge. The mood is clean, cold, bureaucratic, inhuman, and dustless. It must contain no readable names, no visible characters, no labels, no UI.
prompts.negative_prompt: readable names, Chinese characters, letters, modern folder, hospital chart, fantasy spellbook, large new emblem redesign, blood gore, watermark

input_images.role: Qingming Court tools and wax material reference

prompts.image_prompt: Create one vertical PNG Qingming Court tool board with an insect-wax needle, a bone-white needle tray, Qingming incense ash holder, cold-white incense thread touching a cloth edge, insect-wax seal strips, a corner of the white register, tiny cold-gold pins, and a black-green chitin sliver. Keep the tools small, clean, precise, and institutional. Qingming incense must look like a slow tracking thread, not an attack spell. No modern syringe, no modern lab, no readable text, no labels, no UI.
prompts.negative_prompt: modern medical syringe, blue hospital lab, blood laboratory, gore, attacking smoke magic, high magic, readable text, Chinese characters, watermark, UI

input_images.role: old relay and route material reference

prompts.image_prompt: Create one vertical PNG prop reference for a fragmented continent relay-road map. Show an old damp-proof folded paper map with missing corners, oil-paper backing, old white-stone weights, worn copper-gold route rings, scraped insect-wax cover marks, and faint gold-red broken route lines. It should feel like practical route evidence for Canyang Ao to the border wall, not a complete fantasy world poster. All map marks are abstract and unreadable; no place names, no letters, no Chinese characters, no UI.
prompts.negative_prompt: readable place names, complete fantasy map poster, modern map grid, compass UI, bright glowing route, clean full Sun-Moon emblem, watermark, labels

input_images.role: Grey Wall bone whistle material reference

prompts.image_prompt: Create one vertical PNG comparison prop board for a Grey Wall bone whistle and a Northern bone flute. The Grey Wall whistle is short, tactical, worn smooth, tied to grey wall cloth with a simple cord and old iron ring, used for reading wind before battle. The Northern bone flute is longer, wind-eroded, snow-gritted, tied with rawhide and a dark blood oath cord, with Minggu Ridge wind-hole character. Use bone white, grey wall cloth, old iron, snow dust, ochre rawhide, and faint ice-blue survival-fire reflection. No polished instrument catalog, no official crest, no readable carving, no labels.
prompts.negative_prompt: modern flute, polished product photo, clean faction badge, new Grey Wall emblem, cute folk prop, readable carving, Chinese characters, UI, watermark

input_images.role: Wallfoot unofficial symbol reference if available; object marks only

prompts.image_prompt: Create one vertical PNG Wallfoot prop group board: a border ration plate, a black-market wooden pass tag with one shaved corner, a broken pottery charm with two holes and a broken path line, grey-blue cord, old yellow cloth, hidden-pocket stitch sample, hand-worn dark wood, terracotta edges, and small dark-green scale-hint arcs. These are unofficial survival trade objects, not a faction emblem. The board should feel lived-in, cautious, organized, and practical. No visible text, no labels, no clean national crest.
prompts.negative_prompt: formal badge, new Wallfoot crest, modern gang logo, readable market text, slum caricature, monsterized hybrid mark, UI, watermark

input_images.role: future Qingming Court white ring reflection reference

prompts.image_prompt: Create one vertical PNG small emotional prop board for Shen Zhaomian: a burnt hair cord, a small herb-green pouch, simple child cloth tie, dry herb stems, light-grey garment scrap, and a subtle insect-wax identification-ring reflection as a future Qingming Court hint. The objects are child-sized, practical, old but complete, and intimate. Show family memory, not horror. No readable name tag, no cute toy styling, no excessive burn damage, no labels.
prompts.negative_prompt: readable name tag, cute toy set, horror victim tableau, gore, excessive fire damage, modern accessory, watermark, UI, text

prompts.image_prompt: Create one vertical PNG three-state costume board for Shen Weisang, a 17-year-old lean hunter. Show front and practical detail views for: Canyang Ao hunter outfit, post-fire fugitive outfit, and border snowline outfit. Core anchors: grey-brown short practical layers, washed herb-green inner robe, old leather wrist guards, hunting bow, trap cord, short knife sheath, route pouch, left-shoulder asymmetry, and a charred hem after episode 02. Snowline state adds grey hemp cloak, old leather shoulder protection, and leg wraps without becoming military armor. Production costume reference, no labels or text inside image.
prompts.negative_prompt: adult warlord, heroic armor, beggar rags, shredded clothing, mud-covered refugee, high fantasy prince, readable labels, text, watermark

input_images.role: old empire formal and hidden royal color reference
locked Zhaoming emblem reference; hidden/partial marks only

prompts.image_prompt: Create one vertical PNG three-state costume board for Yan Nanzhi, an 18-year-old old-empire royal branch fugitive with controlled aristocratic posture. Show: mist-purple or cold-grey fugitive concealment travel robe with clean edges and hidden inner pockets; old empire formal reveal costume inspired by Ming-style Hanfu structure with vermilion, royal blue, moon-white layers, worn gold cloud and partial sun-moon dark motifs; border snowline cloak state with dark grey cloak and moon-white lining glimpsed only in movement. The fugitive front layer must not expose a clean Sun-Moon emblem. Include red hair cord, hidden jade and blood-writ carry logic. No visible labels or text.
prompts.negative_prompt: visible royal badge on fugitive outfit, modern princess, dirty disheveled travel state, full clean crest, fantasy ball gown, readable labels, watermark

input_images.role: Wallfoot object-symbol and trade-token reference if available

prompts.image_prompt: Create one vertical PNG three-state costume board for Lu Qingli, a 15-16-year-old Wallfoot hybrid girl. Show: Wallfoot market outfit, escape light outfit, and borrowed snowline outfit. Core anchors: grey-blue short jacket, terracotta inner layer, old yellow cloth, narrow belt, hidden pocket stitching, black-market wooden pass tag, broken pottery charm, narrow hidden knife, and tiny dark-green scale arcs behind the ear visible only in close detail. Clothing is compact, clean enough to read, heavily used but not ragged. No formal uniform, no official crest, no visible labels or text.
prompts.negative_prompt: monsterized hybrid, generic thief costume, formal faction uniform, beggar rags, oversized fantasy armor, readable labels, watermark

input_images.role: locked Zhaoming emblem reference for almost-erased armor pressure mark only

prompts.image_prompt: Create one vertical PNG three-state costume board for Xue Linqiang, a weather-bent old wall master around 50. Show: daily wall-guard outfit, night heavy-guard outfit, and concealed assistance outfit. Core anchors: grey-stone padded jacket, inherited mismatched old armor plates, coarse hemp wall scarf, snowline leg wraps, old iron buckles, bone whistle fixed to chest or belt, worn long spear, frost-cracked hands, and an almost-erased Sun-Moon pressure mark hidden on the inside or edge of an old armor plate. He must look like a long-term wall soldier, not a palace general. No labels or text.
prompts.negative_prompt: complete Zhaoming emblem, shiny heroic commander, palace armor, clean knight plate, beggar militia, modern uniform, readable labels, watermark

input_images.role: locked Qingming emblem reference for small institutional marks only

prompts.image_prompt: Create one vertical PNG three-state costume board for Bai Yi, an upper-intelligence insect Qingming inspector. Show: Qingming inspector official robe, pseudo-human ruler formal robe, and pursuit official robe. He is tall, vertical, clean, and visibly insect, not a human in a mask. Core anchors: high narrow cylindrical Qingming official hat integrated with head carapace, insect-wax white floor-length robe, bone-white hard collar, white chitin face plate, dark compound-eye sockets, translucent wing-membrane shoulder cape, thin white straps or bead chains, small black-sun institutional mark, cold-gold pins, white register and insect-wax needle accessories. No human hair, no true human face, no labels or text.
prompts.negative_prompt: human hair, masked human, handsome human official, black-armored warlord, monster gore, lower-tier insect body, modern sci-fi, readable labels, watermark

prompts.image_prompt: Create one vertical PNG three-state child costume board for Shen Zhaomian, age 8-10 with stable child proportions. Show: village child herb outfit with light grey short ru, herb-green small apron or skirt, simple cloth shoes, burnt hair cord and small herb pouch; post-fire missing-child anchor with smoke edge but clothing still intact; Qingming Court child-white identifier outfit with clean white child robe, narrow sleeves, wrist insect-wax identification ring, and the burnt hair cord or herb pouch preserved as a family relic. Mood should be restrained and painful, not horror. No labels or text.
prompts.negative_prompt: aged-up teenager, horror victim styling, gore, filthy rags, lost family relics, cute toy dress-up, readable labels, watermark

input_images.role: locked Zhaoming root reference, hidden or partial costume motifs only
locked Qingming root reference, official marks only
locked Northern Wanshou root reference, bone-wood craft only

prompts.image_prompt: Create one vertical PNG faction costume system board for Severed Homeland season 01. Show practical wardrobe hierarchy samples, not a poster: Zhaoming remnant hidden old-imperial clothing with concealed sun-moon dark motifs; Qingming upper official white robe, clerk/needle attendant, and lower military chitin binding differences; Grey Wall Army military household padded clothing with old armor pressure marks and bone whistle; Wallfoot hybrid unofficial survival clothing with short jackets, hidden pockets, pass tags and pottery charms; Northern Wanshou bone-wood-fur clothing with rawhide and oath cords. Preserve the current emblems only as tiny partial marks or material references; do not create new badges. No visible labels or text.
prompts.negative_prompt: new faction badges, modern uniform lineup, readable labels, flat generic fantasy uniforms, full bright flags, Qingming hierarchy flattened into humans, UI, watermark

prompts.image_prompt: Create one vertical PNG crowd and class costume board for season 01. Show small production-reference samples for Canyang Ao farmer-hunter villagers, Jinhe grain-mill laborers and boat workers, Qingming Court clerks and child identifiers, Wallfoot market vendors and military families, Grey Wall rank-and-file military households, and Northern migrants or ridge survivors. Every costume is old but complete, occupationally readable, practical, and region-colored. Include sleeves, aprons, tools, belts, shoes, wraps, and hang-points, not anonymous ragged masses. No visible labels, no text, no UI.
prompts.negative_prompt: anonymous refugee rags, beggar crowd, modern streetwear, fashion runway, monster crowd, readable labels, Chinese characters, watermark
